# Feature Request

## Problem Statement

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Change

What should Keystone do differently?

## Why This Fits Keystone

Explain why this improves routing quality, evidence quality, workflow honesty, or contributor usability.

## Scope Boundary

What is intentionally out of scope for this request?

## Additional Context

Optional examples, references, or prior discussion.
